results.title: Fifty migrants feared lost in Mediterranean, 10 survive after boat capsizes, security sources say
results.description: At least 50 migrants, including women and children, were feared lost at sea, while 10 survived, ​after their wooden boat capsized on Tuesday in ‌the Mediterranean Sea off the eastern coast of Libya, two security sources told Reuters.

results.title: Trump threatens to target Iran’s power plants, bridges unless Tehran returns to talks

results.title: Report: Corporate political spending buys billions in tax breaks
results.description: A new watchdog report found for some big corporations, political spending is a very good investment.
